_comment: Map WC 2026 matches to Stake.com fixture slugs. The slug is the part after the last dash in the Stake.com match URL. Example: https://stake.com/sports/soccer/fifa_world/canada-vs-morocco/46602331-w73-w75 → slug is '46602331-w73-w75'. Update this file before each match round by browsing Stake.com and copying the slugs.
